title: Grilled Rocket and Lemon Fajitas
description: A Mexican-inspired dish featuring grilled rocket, lemons, and bake, served with a side of warm flour tortillas.

ingredients.name: Optional toppings: avocado, sour cream, cilantro

instructions: 1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the diced bake and cook until slightly charred, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Add the rocket leaves to the skillet, cook for 1-2 minutes, until slightly wilted.
4. Squeeze the lemon juice over the rocket mixture and toss to combine.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Warm the flour tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
7. Assemble the fajitas by placing a portion of the rocket and bake mixture onto each tortilla.
8. Top with desired toppings, such as avocado, sour cream, and cilantro.
